Access-Control-Max-Age: '600'
For all routes and methods below, the integration configuration is the same:
/auth-cookies GET
/instance GET
/instance/turnoff PUT
/instance/turnon PUT
/list-videos GET
/playlist/{video_id} GET
Method request
Authorization: OwncastCognito
Request paths (only for playlist/{video_id})
Name: video_id
Caching: Inactive
HTTP request headers
Name: Authorization
Required: True
Caching: Inactive
Integration request
Integration type: Lambda
Region: [YourRegion]
Lambda proxy integration: true
Lambda function: [YourLambdaFunction]
Integration response: None
Method responses
HTTP Status Code: 200
Response Headers: None
Response body:
Content type: application/json
Model: Empty
